properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v5 v7 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Feels like I've been holding my breath Trying to still my restless heart Everything hangs on my next step Finding my nerve, playing my part

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I found shelter underneath his crown Found favour inside his eyes Rock this boat, and I just might drown Honesty seems to come with a price

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's a time to hold your tongue Time to keep your head down There's a time but it's not now

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Sometimes you gotta go, uninvited Sometimes you gotta speak when you don't have the floor Sometimes you gotta move When everybody else says you should stay No way, no, not today

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You gotta ask if you want an answer Sometimes you gotta stand apart from the crowd Long before your heart could run the risk You were born for this (born for this) Hey, you were born for this (born for this)

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: I'm leaning on the ones before me My father's father's dreams I'm standing on the top of their shoulders Calling the One delivering me

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: One step, one move Born to trust you Made to lay my Life before you So I gotta go, uninvited
